title: interview output envelope
description:
Envelope returned by ``hpc-mapreduce interview``.

Reports the artifacts persisted (interview.json, optionally
meta.json) and a dry-resolve preview so the calling agent can
echo 'sweep starts here, midpoint here, ends here' back to the
operator before submit.

campaign_dir.description: Absolute path to the campaign workdir (where tasks.py and the persisted interview.json live).
campaign_dir.title: Campaign Dir

artifacts.description: Relative paths (under campaign_dir) of every file the primitive wrote or updated. Always includes interview.json; includes meta.json when intent.cluster_target or intent.budget triggered an update.
artifacts.title: Artifacts

total_tasks.description: Result of calling tasks.total() against the campaign's tasks.py. Cross-checked against intent.task_count.
total_tasks.title: Total Tasks

cmd_sha.description: compute_cmd_sha() over the campaign's tasks.py. Embedded in interview.json so future cmd_recall queries can detect drift.
cmd_sha.title: Cmd Sha

preview.description: Three sample resolve() calls. Each is a dict per claude-hpc's pre-existing tasks.py contract.
